name: chain__tendersinfo_comgovernment_contracts_be
method: tendersinfo .comgovernment contracts before they close.filter by country, department, budget, deadline.$500b+ in government spending every year. most of it posted publicly. nobody cold emails for it.

stages.task: Scrape SAM.gov API (free, no auth needed for public data) + state procurement portals for new tenders. Filter: budget >$50K, deadline >14 days, categories matching our service capabilities

Score tenders by: set-aside status (small biz preferred), competition level (fewer bidders = better), budget size, alignment with services we can broker. Reject: classified, requires clearance, budget <$25K
For each qualified tender, find 3-5 small businesses on SAM.gov entity registry that match the NAICS code and have active registrations. Extract contact info.

Cold email matched businesses: 'Found a $X government contract in [category] with deadline [date]. Your firm matches the requirements. Want the full RFP details?' Monetize via: referral fee, monthly lead subscription, or commission on won contracts.
